nodes.name: character.ts
nodes.summary: Loads and indexes race, guild, and perk data from JSON files into lookup maps. Provides getter functions for retrieving race, guild, guild-rank, and perk objects by name, plus a helper to detect the Monk guild.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; exports typed arrays and helper lookup functions from JSON data sources.

nodes.name: equipment.ts
nodes.summary: Loads and indexes armor, ring, rune, and enchantment data from JSON, building lookup maps for fast access. Provides getter functions and armor-slot inspection utilities (part lookup, slot-type detection).
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; re-exports raw enchantment data alongside typed arrays; armor parts are merged from sharedPart defaults.

nodes.name: weapons.ts
nodes.summary: Loads and indexes weapon blade, handle, glove, and essence data from JSON files into lookup maps. Exports typed arrays and per-type getter functions.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; straightforward JSON import and Object.fromEntries pattern for map construction.

nodes.name: dmgTypeBonuses.ts
nodes.summary: Defines perk-to-damage-type bonus mappings (Void Rage, Channeled Weapon, Emotional, Draconic Blood) with conditional logic. Exports buildDmgTypeBonuses which computes a cumulative damage-type bonus record from active perks and context.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; uses conditional objects with getType/getAmountPerStack callbacks; references external constants for perk values.

nodes.name: enchant.ts
nodes.summary: Core enchantment application engine. Implements a two-phase stat modifier system (selector transforms then direct modifiers), perk effectiveness scaling, infusion halves stats, and enchant-slot enforcement logic including exclusive enchant handling.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; complex multi-phase stat application with multiplier/addition modifiers; uses STAT_KEYS iteration; builds exempt perk sets from raw enchantment data.

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module for the engine package. Aggregates and re-exports all public APIs from data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, and format submodules.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; six re-export statements only.

nodes.name: format.ts
nodes.summary: Provides stat formatting utilities: formatStat rounds values and appends percent signs for percent-type stats; formatLabel converts camelCase keys to Title Case labels.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; simple string formatting functions.

nodes.name: shrine.ts
nodes.summary: Implements shrine tier multipliers (1–5 with decreasing multipliers from 3.0x to 1.0x) and applies them to weapon scalings and stat maps. Used to model the in-game shrine buff on gear.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; exports a constant multiplier map and two apply functions for scalings and stats.

nodes.name: weapon.ts
nodes.summary: Core weapon calculation engine. Merges blade/handle or glove/essence parts, applies shrine multipliers, detects hybrid weapons (1.5x scaling bonus), resolves weapon types with perk-based overrides (Dual Wielding, Kama Blades, etc.), and computes monk weapon bonuses per rank. Exports the complete WeaponResult interface.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; large module with many helper functions (extractDamageAndScalings, mergePartPerks, mergeScalingsAndStats, buildWeaponResult); complex weapon-type resolution via override table.

nodes.name: Modal.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable modal dialog component with fade/fly transitions, focus trapping, and auto-focus on open. Provides extensive global CSS for modal list items, stat pills, perk tags, rank buttons, and filter selects used by all modal variants.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 syntax with export let props and slot; uses Svelte transitions (fade, fly); has both instance and module script blocks.

nodes.name: AccessorySelectModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting armor pieces (helmet/chestplate/leggings), rings, runes, and infusion items. Computes effective boost values using weapon scalings and supports Brawny conversion simulation. Integrates search, tag filtering, and stat sort modes.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 syntax; uses reactive declarations heavily; imports from store, engine, types, and multiple shared UI components.

nodes.name: GuildModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting a guild and its rank. Displays guild ranks with per-rank stats and perks, supports search and tag filtering. Uses setGuild helper from the store to update build state.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 syntax; contains a dynamic import of engine for tag matching in the filter callback.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel module that re-exports all modal components: RaceModal, GuildModal, AccessorySelectModal, and WeaponPartModal.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; four default re-exports.

nodes.name: RaceModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting a character race. Lists all races with passive descriptions and stat modifier pills, supports search filtering, and updates the build store on selection.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 syntax; simple filtered list with highlight and stat display.

nodes.name: WeaponPartModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting weapon parts (blade, handle, glove, or essence). Displays tier badges, type badges, attack speed, stats, and perks. Supports tier and type dropdown filters alongside stat-based filtering.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 syntax; conditionally adapts title/storeKey/labels based on modalType prop.

nodes.name: StatFilterShared.svelte
nodes.summary: Shared stat-filter chip component with include/exclude/dimmed states. Exports a buildStatMaps utility for creating label and color maps from stat group definitions. Handles click, contextmenu, and keyboard events via Svelte event dispatching.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 syntax; has both module-level script (for buildStatMaps) and instance script; uses createEventDispatcher.

nodes.name: elementalBoosts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the canonical list of elemental boost stat definitions (dexterity through summon) with their display labels, plus a negative variant map prefixed with 'neg:' for stat filtering UI.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; exports two arrays of StatDef objects.

nodes.name: filterActions.ts
nodes.summary: Provides a factory function createFilterActions that returns toggle, remove, clear, and keyboard handler methods for managing an include/exclude filter state map. Used by stat filter UIs.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; pure functional factory pattern with getter/setter/notify callbacks.

nodes.name: store.ts
nodes.summary: Central Svelte store managing the entire build state. Provides the build writable store with localStorage persistence, a derived result store via calcBuild, and helper functions for enchantment management, guild selection, armor slot movement/swapping, and ring-infusion swapping.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; uses Svelte writable/derived stores; debounced localStorage save; complex armor slot type mapping and move/swap logic.

nodes.name: toast.ts
nodes.summary: Toast notification store using Svelte writable. Provides addToast and removeToast functions with auto-expiry via setTimeout. Supports success, error, info, and warning toast types.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; simple writable store with auto-incrementing IDs and timed removal.

nodes.name: Toast.svelte
nodes.summary: Toast notification display component. Renders active toasts from the toast store with type-specific styling (success/error/info/warning) and icons, fly-in transition, and manual dismiss buttons.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 4 syntax; subscribes to toast store reactively; uses Svelte fly transition.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Core type definitions for the entire application. Defines StatKey/StatMap from a STAT_CONFIG object, interfaces for Race, Guild, Armor, Ring, Rune, Enchantment, Perk, BuildState, weapon types (Blade, Handle, MonkGlove, MonkEssence), ProcCoefficient, BoostEntry/Result, WeaponBaseDmg, and utility functions like applyUpgrade, getProcCoeffValue, and canProc.
nodes.languageNotes: TypeScript; extensive type-only exports; uses 'as const' for STAT_CONFIG; re-exports from constants/damage-types; defines complex intersection types for weapon parts with scaling keys.

nodes.name: Badge.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable badge/chip UI component supporting multiple color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, muted, draco), sizes (xs, sm, md), square/solid/mono/tag modes, and optional custom color via inline styles. Uses Svelte 5 snippet API for children.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 syntax using $props() and Snippet type for children.

nodes.name: Button.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable button UI component with semantic color variants (positive, negative, warning, info, neutral), three sizes, active state toggle, and disabled support. Uses Svelte 5 snippet API.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 syntax using $props() and Snippet type for children.

nodes.name: Card.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable card container component with variant styles (default, surface, ghost), hoverable mode, colored accent borders, configurable padding/gap, and optional click handler with keyboard accessibility. Uses Svelte 5 snippet API.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 syntax using $props() and Snippet type for children.

edges.label: imports type { Race, Guild, GuildRank, Perk }
imports type { Armor, ArmorPart, Ring, Rune, Enchantment }
imports type { WeaponBlade, WeaponHandle, MonkGlove, MonkEssence }
imports { StatKey, StatModifier, StatMap, Enchantment, STAT_KEYS, PERCENT_STATS, applyUpgrade }
imports type { StatMap, WeaponBlade, WeaponHandle, MonkGlove, MonkEssence } and { STAT_KEYS }
